title: Plating Maintenance Technician
description:
Main Duties And Responsibilities To Be Accomplished :

• Organize the maintenance schedule for all equipment in Plating

• Carry out installation and modification of machines and equipment

• Carry out all general maintenance work on plating line equipment, ie motor, pump rectifier etc.

• Carry out general electrical works, repairs, troubleshooting and maintenance of machines and equipment.

• Liaise with vendor to do repair on equipment or process, cleanness

• Purchase component and spare part related to electrical and control item to minimize the cost

• Daily / periodic check, record and feedback all plating equipment for continuous operation

• Support DI/waste treatment operation


Requirements

• Diploma in Electrical or Mechanical

• More than 3 years of working experience in maintenance environment

• Able to read electrical drawing and Autocad experience

• Able to work independently with minimum guidance.

• Able to communicate effective

• Willing to overtime when required

Working hours:

Shift work,2 shifts, 12 hours rotation (4 days work week)
